source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Succulent Rosette
identity.motif: succulent rosette with blue-green powdery leaves and blush edges

typography: Inter for precise English wellness dashboards with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese UI labels, habit tables, and calm status messaging.
layout: Neat 8px grids, rounded-but-quiet panels, radial rosette grouping, soft powder texture, measured dashboard density, and wellness navigation built for repeated daily use.

prompts.label: Transparent succulent rosette motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on #ff00ff chroma key, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Succulent Rosette transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a dry garden succulent rosette botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact echeveria-like succulent rosette with layered spoon-shaped leaves, blue-green powdery wax bloom, cool jade and sea-glass centers, subtle blush-pink leaf edges, pale gravel-grey underside shadows, and a neat radial spiral. Botanical accuracy, crisp opaque subject edges, symmetrical wellness-garden identity, no cactus spines, no aloe spears, no flowers.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full rosette from a three-quarter top angle without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves the powdery succulent texture; no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no pot, no hand, no soil bed, no pebbles, no desert landscape, no second plant, no flower stalk, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Succulent Rosette light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Succulent Rosette", derived from the visible transparent succulent rosette cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible neat wellness product system.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, crisp UI details, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Succulent Rosette, Succulent Rosette, Light Mode, Palette, Typography, English, Japanese Typography, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from blue-green powdery succulent leaves, cool jade centers, blush-pink leaf edges, gravel-grey shadows, dry garden neutrals, pale wax bloom, and neat radial rosette geometry. The board must read as a succulent rosette, not agave, cactus, aloe, generic plant, or spa stock imagery.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, wellness navigation, habit dashboard metric cards, calm data charts, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, texture samples, token chips, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, dry garden off-white backgrounds, succulent blue-green primary actions, blush-edge accent chips, gravel-grey borders, jade success states, neat radial alignment, subtle waxy-leaf powder texture. Quiet utilitarian wellness system, not a landing page and not decorative marketing.
Color palette: blue green succulent, jade bloom, blush edge, gravel grey, dry garden neutral, deep leaf shadow; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Constraints: no cactus spines, no aloe spear leaves, no orange/brown desert palette, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Succulent Rosette", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Succulent Rosette dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Succulent Rosette". It must feel like the visible Morphous Succulent Rosette light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible succulent rosette cutout.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, crisp UI details, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Succulent Rosette, Succulent Rosette, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, English, Japanese Typography, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the visible light board structure, component coverage, typography guidance, token roles, wellness dashboard density, and succulent visual language. Use the visible light board as the layout reference and convert it to dark mode. Preserve motif-derived palette roles: deep leaf-shadow backgrounds, pale wax-bloom text, blue-green active controls, soft jade surfaces, blush-edge highlights, gravel-grey borders, dry garden neutral dividers, subtle powdery leaf texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, wellness navigation, habit dashboard metric cards, calm data charts, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, texture samples, token chips, simple icons.
Visual details: deep blue-green leaf-shadow surfaces, wax-bloom foreground, jade active controls, blush-edge status accents, gravel-grey borders, dry garden neutral panels, subtle rosette texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls. Quiet utilitarian wellness system, not a marketing page.
Color palette: deep leaf shadow, blue green succulent, jade bloom, blush edge, gravel grey, dry garden neutral; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Constraints: no cactus spines, no aloe spear leaves, no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no orange/brown desert palette, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Succulent Rosette".
